'''lachogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hubbardiid|hubbardiid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hubbardiid|hubbardiid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lachogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læchegeth|læchegeth]] || [[word:læchegej|læchegej]] || [[word:læchegesh|læchegesh]] || [[word:læchege|læchege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lachochogoth|lachochogoth]] || [[word:lachochogoj|lachochogoj]] || [[word:lachochogosh|lachochogosh]] || [[word:lachochogo|lachochogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lachogoth|lachogoth]] || [[word:lachogoj|lachogoj]] || [[word:lachogosh|lachogosh]] || [[word:lachogo|lachogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lachofgoth|lachofgoth]] || [[word:lachofgoj|lachofgoj]] || [[word:lachofgosh|lachofgosh]] || [[word:lachofgof|lachofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lachogotho|lachogotho]] || [[word:lachogojo|lachogojo]] || [[word:lachogosho|lachogosho]] || [[word:lachogoko|lachogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lachogoth|lachogoth]] || [[word:lachogoj|lachogoj]] || [[word:lachogosh|lachogosh]] || [[word:lachogo|lachogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lachogothol|lachogothol]] || [[word:lachogojol|lachogojol]] || [[word:lachogoshol|lachogoshol]] || [[word:lachogokol|lachogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lachogothotho|lachogothotho]] || [[word:lachogojojo|lachogojojo]] || [[word:lachogoshosho|lachogoshosho]] || [[word:lachogoko|lachogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lachogothon|lachogothon]] || [[word:lachogojon|lachogojon]] || [[word:lachogoshon|lachogoshon]] || [[word:lachogokon|lachogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lachogothoro|lachogothoro]] || [[word:lachogojoro|lachogojoro]] || [[word:lachogoshoro|lachogoshoro]] || [[word:lachogokoro|lachogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
